history.text: Ancient Carthage appears in Tunisia's historical record.
Aghlabid Emirate ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Hafsid Sultanate ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
Beylik of Tunis appears in Tunisia's historical record.
French protectorate placed the territory under outside administration.
Independence and Kingdom ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
The republic was declared, shifting Tunisia toward a republican form of government.
